title: Ending song for TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion
display_title: Ending song for TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Ending song for TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion Post by kelvin7vk » Mon May 16, 2011 4:51 pm not the song for the credits (fly me to the moon), but i was wondering where i could find the instrumental version of Cruel Angel Thesis that plays in the last episode with the "congratulations" ending? i already downloaded the OST from bakabt, and can't seem to find that instrumental. any help would be appreciated.

[]: Re: Ending song for TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion Post by Azathoth » Mon May 16, 2011 5:37 pm It's called "Good, or Don't Be" and is the last track on OST 3.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 16, 2011 6:00 pm You want this: http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Shiro-Sagisu/dp/B00023P3XO/
